text.div:
Id: IMMZD2DTMeningococcalQuadrivalentConjugateVaccines2Doses
Url: IMMZ.D2.DT.Meningococcal.Quadrivalent conjugate vaccines 2 doses
Version: 0.2.0
Title: IMMZ.D2.DT.Meningococcal.Quadrivalent conjugate vaccines 2 doses
Status: draft
Type:

system: http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/plan-definition-type

code: eca-rule

Date: 2026-03-29 17:23:09+0000
Publisher: WHO
Description:

IMMZ.D2.DT.Meningococcal.Quadrivalent conjugate vaccines 2 doses Quadrivalent conjugate vaccines (A,C,W135,Y-D), 2-dose schedule
Knowledge Capability: computable
Related Artifacts:

References

  • WHO recommendations for routine immunization - summary tables (January 2025)
Libraries:
IMMZD2DTMeningococcalQuadrivalentConjugateVaccines2DosesLogic
Actions:
Determine if the client is due for Meningococcal.: Determine if the client is due for Meningococcal vaccine according to the national immunization protocol. Quadrivalent conjugate vaccines (A,C,W135,Y-D), 2-dose schedule
If: Applicability: Client is due for meningococcal vaccination (Client is due for meningococcal vaccination)
Then: Definition: IMMZD2DTMR
Dynamic Values:
status: ('draft')
intent: ('proposal')
medication: (Concept { codes: { Code { system: 'http://smart.who.int/immunizations/CodeSystem/IMMZ.Z', code: 'DE10', display: 'Meningococcal vaccines' } }, display: 'Meningococcal vaccines' })
Check for Guidance for the patient regarding IMMZ.D2.DT.Meningococcal.Quadrivalent conjugate vaccines 2 doses.: Show Guidance for the patient regarding IMMZ.D2.DT.Meningococcal.Quadrivalent conjugate vaccines 2 doses.
If: Applicability: Has Guidance (Has Guidance)
Then: Definition: IMMZ.D2.DT.CR
Dynamic Values:
status: ('active')
payload.contentString: (Guidance)
category.coding: (Code { system: 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/communication-category', code: 'alert' })
priority: (Code { system: 'http://hl7.org/fhir/request-priority', code: 'routine' })

extension.valueString: IMMZEncounterElements
Current Patient Age In Months

/** 
 * @dataElement Patient age in months
 */
define "Current Patient Age In Months":
  AgeInMonthsAt(Today)
IMMZD2DTMeningococcalEncounterElements
Client's age is less than 9 months
IMMZD2DTMeningococcalQuadrivalentConjugateVaccines2DosesLogic
Client is not due for meningococcal vaccination Case 1
IMMZElements
Doses Administered to Patient

/**
 * @dataElement All Doses Administered to Patient
 */
define "Doses Administered to Patient":
  [Immunization] I
    where I.status = 'completed'
    and I.isSubpotent is not true
IMMZEncounterElements
Doses Administered to Patient

/**
 * @dataElement All Doses Administered to Patient
 */
define "Doses Administered to Patient":
  Elements."Doses Administered to Patient" I
    where I.occurrence.toInterval() same day or before Today
IMMZD2DTMeningococcalEncounterElements
Meningococcal Doses Administered to Patient

/*
@internal: Meningococcal containing Doses Administered to Patient
*/
define "Meningococcal Doses Administered to Patient":
  Encounter."Doses Administered to Patient" I
  where
    I.vaccineCode in Concepts."Meningococcal vaccines"
IMMZD2DTMeningococcalEncounterElements
Meningococcal Primary Series Doses Administered to Patient
IMMZD2DTMeningococcalEncounterElements
Number of Meningococcal Primary Series Doses Administered
IMMZD2DTMeningococcalEncounterElements
One meningococcal primary series dose was administered
IMMZD2DTMeningococcalEncounterElements
Date of First Primary Series Meningococcal Dose
IMMZD2DTMeningococcalEncounterElements
Client's age was less than or equal to 23 months when the primary series was started
IMMZD2DTMeningococcalEncounterElements
Date of Latest Primary Meningococcal Dose
IMMZD2DTMeningococcalEncounterElements
The latest meningococcal dose was administered less than 3 months ago
IMMZD2DTMeningococcalQuadrivalentConjugateVaccines2DosesLogic
Client is not due for meningococcal vaccination Case 2
IMMZD2DTMeningococcalQuadrivalentConjugateVaccines2DosesLogic
Client is not due for meningococcal vaccination
IMMZD2DTMeningococcalQuadrivalentConjugateVaccines2DosesLogic
Client is not due for meningococcal vaccination Guidance

/*
@output: Client is not due for meningococcal vaccination Guidance
@guidance = Should not vaccinate client with first meningococcal dose as client's age is less than 9 months. 
Check for any vaccines due and inform the caregiver of when to come back for the first dose.
@guidance = Should not vaccinate client with second meningococcal dose as the latest meningococcal dose was administered less than 3 months ago. 
Check for any other vaccines due and inform the caregiver of when to come back for the second dose.
*/
define "Client is not due for meningococcal vaccination Guidance":
  case
    when "Client is not due for meningococcal vaccination Case 1" then 'Should not vaccinate client with first meningococcal dose as client\'s age is less than 9 months. 
Check for any vaccines due and inform the caregiver of when to come back for the first dose.'
    when "Client is not due for meningococcal vaccination Case 2" then 'Should not vaccinate client with second meningococcal dose as the latest meningococcal dose was administered less than 3 months ago. 
Check for any other vaccines due and inform the caregiver of when to come back for the second dose.'
    else ''
  end
IMMZD2DTMeningococcalEncounterElements
No meningococcal primary series dose was administered
IMMZD2DTMeningococcalEncounterElements
Client's age is more than 9 months
IMMZD2DTMeningococcalEncounterElements
Client's age is more than or equal to 9 months
IMMZD2DTMeningococcalQuadrivalentConjugateVaccines2DosesLogic
Client is due for meningococcal vaccination Case 1
IMMZD2DTMeningococcalEncounterElements
The latest meningococcal dose was administered more than 3 months ago
IMMZD2DTMeningococcalQuadrivalentConjugateVaccines2DosesLogic
Client is due for meningococcal vaccination Case 2
IMMZD2DTMeningococcalQuadrivalentConjugateVaccines2DosesLogic
Client is due for meningococcal vaccination
IMMZD2DTMeningococcalQuadrivalentConjugateVaccines2DosesLogic
Client is due for meningococcal vaccination Guidance

/*
@output: Client is due for meningococcal vaccination Guidance
@guidance = Should vaccinate client with first meningococcal dose as no meningococcal doses were administered and client is within appropriate age range.
Check for contraindications.
@guidance = Should vaccinate client with second meningococcal dose as client's age was less than 23 months when the primary series was started and the latest meningococcal dose was administered more than 3 months ago. 
Check for contraindications.
*/
define "Client is due for meningococcal vaccination Guidance":
  case
    when "Client is due for meningococcal vaccination Case 1" then 'Should vaccinate client with first meningococcal dose as no meningococcal doses were administered and client is within appropriate age range.
Check for contraindications.'
    when "Client is due for meningococcal vaccination Case 2" then 'Should vaccinate client with second meningococcal dose as client\'s age was less than 23 months when the primary series was started and the latest meningococcal dose was administered more than 3 months ago. 
Check for contraindications.'
    else ''
  end
IMMZD2DTMeningococcalEncounterElements
Client's age was more than 23 months when the primary series was started
IMMZD2DTMeningococcalQuadrivalentConjugateVaccines2DosesLogic
Meningococcal immunization schedule is complete Case 1
IMMZD2DTMeningococcalEncounterElements
Two meningococcal primary series doses were administered
IMMZD2DTMeningococcalQuadrivalentConjugateVaccines2DosesLogic
Meningococcal immunization schedule is complete Case 2
IMMZD2DTMeningococcalQuadrivalentConjugateVaccines2DosesLogic
Meningococcal immunization schedule is complete
IMMZD2DTMeningococcalQuadrivalentConjugateVaccines2DosesLogic
Meningococcal immunization schedule is complete Guidance

/*
@output: Meningococcal immunization schedule is complete Guidance
@guidance = Meningococcal immunization schedule is complete as client's age was more than 23 months when primary series was started. One primary series dose was administered. 
Check for any other vaccines due.
@guidance = Meningococcal immunization schedule is complete. Two primary series doses were administered. 
Check for any other vaccines due.
*/
define "Meningococcal immunization schedule is complete Guidance":
  case
    when "Meningococcal immunization schedule is complete Case 1" then 'Meningococcal immunization schedule is complete as client\'s age was more than 23 months when primary series was started. One primary series dose was administered. 
Check for any other vaccines due.'
    when "Meningococcal immunization schedule is complete Case 2" then 'Meningococcal immunization schedule is complete. Two primary series doses were administered. 
Check for any other vaccines due.'
    else ''
  end
IMMZD2DTMeningococcalQuadrivalentConjugateVaccines2DosesLogic
Guidance

/*
@dynamicValue: Guidance
*/
define "Guidance":
  case 
    when "Client is not due for meningococcal vaccination" then "Client is not due for meningococcal vaccination Guidance"
    when "Client is due for meningococcal vaccination" then "Client is due for meningococcal vaccination Guidance"
    when "Meningococcal immunization schedule is complete" then "Meningococcal immunization schedule is complete Guidance" 
    else ''
  end
IMMZD2DTMeningococcalQuadrivalentConjugateVaccines2DosesLogic
Has Guidance

define "Has Guidance":
  "Guidance" is not null and "Guidance" != ''
IMMZCommon
seriesPrimary

/**
 * @description: Gets the doses from the primary series
 */
define fluent function seriesPrimary(immunizations List<Immunization>):
  immunizations I where
    exists( I.protocolApplied pa where pa.series = 'Primary series' )
FHIRHelpers
ToString
define function ToString(value string): value.value
FHIRHelpers
ToString
define function ToString(value ImmunizationStatus): value.value
FHIRHelpers
ToBoolean
define function ToBoolean(value boolean): value.value
FHIRHelpers
ToConcept

define function ToConcept(concept FHIR.CodeableConcept):
    if concept is null then
        null
    else
        System.Concept {
            codes: concept.coding C return ToCode(C),
            display: concept.text.value
        }
FHIRHelpers
ToCode

define function ToCode(coding FHIR.Coding):
    if coding is null then
        null
    else
        System.Code {
          code: coding.code.value,
          system: coding.system.value,
          version: coding.version.value,
          display: coding.display.value
        }
WHOCommon
earliest

define fluent function earliest(immunizations List<Immunization>):
  First(
    immunizations I
      sort by start of occurrence.toInterval()
  )
WHOCommon
mostRecent

define fluent function mostRecent(immunizations List<Immunization>):
  Last(
    immunizations I
      sort by start of occurrence.toInterval()
  )

relatedArtifact.citation: WHO recommendations for routine immunization - summary tables (January 2025)

extension.valueMarkdown:
Quadrivalent conjugate vaccines (A,C,W135,Y-D and A,C,W135,Y-CRM) should be administered as one 
single intramuscular dose to individuals aged ≥ 2 years. A,C,W135,Y-D is also licensed for children aged 9–23 
months and given as a 2-dose series 3 months apart, beginning at 9 months of age.
